name: qadamchi/framework
description: Qadamchi — O'zbekcha, Laravel'ga o'xshash, Composer'siz ishlaydigan PHP mikrofremvork (A versiyasi). composer.json — B versiyasiga o'tish uchun tayyor stub.

suggest.league/container: PSR-11 container — B versiyasida Qadamchi\Container\Container o'rniga (imzo mos)
suggest.monolog/monolog: PSR-3 logger — B versiyasida Qadamchi\Support\Logger o'rniga (imzo mos)
suggest.nyholm/psr7: PSR-7 HTTP message implementation — B versiyasida Request/Response uchun
suggest.psr/http-server-middleware: PSR-15 middleware — B versiyasida onion pipeline o'rniga
